candidate_summary: K-cyclic motif library Lmotif (closed micro-loops in attention pattern) + variable-breath placement gate g_breath (layer-wise zero-output insertion preserving winding number) + pentatonic 5-anchor invariant A_5 (5 attention-anchor directions per referent-family) + wordless-vocable embedding e_luohti (referent-invocation from cyclic-motif identity, not vocabulary) + topological-defect penalty L_defect (winding-number invariance across layers).

decision_rationale: Per-paper coverage of full composition below thresholds (kw<2, sem<0.7, func<0.7 for all 8 results). Primary scored 8 broad-adjacency hits; verifier interprets as Pattern E divergence — flag PassC.
